captureSpa.source: external — active/collisioncapture (sibling repo, not part of this repository's source tree)
captureSpa.note: Found live 2026-07-20 during the TKT-159/TKT-200 capture-ingress audit — was not previously tracked in this file. Standard-tier Azure Static Web App, created 2026-07-16, with a `linkedBackends` entry pointing at cespk-api-dev (this link provides no ingress protection — the Function App's raw origin stays directly reachable regardless, confirmed live by telemetry). Its own repo's top-level README currently states production Azure infrastructure is 'not delivered' and its infra/static-web-app/README.md is still a hosting placeholder — both are stale relative to this live resource. Cross-repo drift, not something this repository's tooling can correct on its own; flagged for whoever owns the collisioncapture repo.

mailIntake.status: live — PLAN-015 alpha posture: the single instructions mailbox is subscribed (Inbox + SentItems). The bootstrap succeeded 2026-07-21 ~16:05Z on the third automated retry, ~1.5 h after the Exchange scope change (RBAC enforcement-cache propagation lag; Test-ServicePrincipalAuthorization had shown InScope=true immediately). Steady state verified: a follow-up maintenance pass renewed exactly the two alpha subscriptions (expiry 2026-07-28) with zero creates/prunes/errors.
mailIntake.mailboxesNote: PLAN-015 alpha (2026-07-21): GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES re-scoped at 14:01:05Z to instructions@ only (minIntakeDate = the cutover instant); the six legacy subscriptions (info@/engineers@/desk@ Inbox + SentItems) were pruned by subscription maintenance at 14:02:42Z. The three legacy mailboxes remain Exchange-RBAC-readable by the app — deliberately, for the LOCAL shadow instance's pull-based poller (TKT-299, never enabled live).
mailIntake.permissionBoundary: CORRECTED 2026-07-21 (was wrongly recorded as read-only), EXTENDED same day (PLAN-015 Phase 1): the Graph Intake app registration (5d37a155-2af8-4878-b96a-6faad5207137) holds Application Mail.ReadWrite AND Application Mail.Read via Exchange Online RBAC for Applications under two custom recipient scopes — CollisionSpike-Intake-Prod, whose recipient filter was extended 2026-07-21 to cover info@/engineers@/desk@ AND instructions@ (old filter banked in TKT-302 evidence for rollback), and CS-Intake-EngDigital covering engineers@. Verified live by Test-ServicePrincipalAuthorization: Mail.Read and Mail.ReadWrite InScope=true for all four mailboxes. The Entra side is empty, so az/Graph queries of the app registration show nothing and misleadingly imply read-only; only Test-ServicePrincipalAuthorization reveals the grant. Mailbox safety therefore rests on code and gates, NOT on permissions.
mailIntake.outlookMutation: disabled by OUTLOOK_MOVE_ENABLED=false on the Data API and orchestration. NB this gate — not the permission grant — is what prevents mail mutation; the identity is write-capable (see permissionBoundary). No delete/purge/send code exists anywhere in the repo; the only mutating mail calls are moveMessage and ensureInboxChildFolder in services/orchestration/src/adapters/graph.ts:585,600.

aiAssistantSurfaces.imageAnalysisSetAt: 2026-07-21 (PLAN-015 Phase 5 alpha trim): flipped false on cespk-api-dev — with the assistant panel off since 11:32Z its output had no review surface and was accumulating write-only ai_suggestion rows (the gap PR #159 flagged). MCP_SERVER_ENABLED deliberately stays true (operator choice).
aiAssistantSurfaces.note: Both flipped true -> false on cespk-api-dev by explicit operator direction ('disable the AI assistant'). Both surfaces are honest-off in code, so the case-page Assistant panel and the header assistant button/drawer now render nothing; no SPA deploy was needed. Server-side, POST /api/cases/{id}/ai-suggestions/generate is an honest no-op and POST /api/assistant/chat refuses. NOT a cosmetic change: AI_MODEL_ENDPOINT and AI_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT (gpt-5) are configured live, so the suggestion route WAS making real model calls beforehand — the gates.ts comment claiming those settings were absent was wrong and is corrected in the same change. No ai_suggestion data is deleted and the list/review routes stay ungated, but staff lose the only UI from which to accept or reject pending rows. Scope: these two names only. IMAGE_ANALYSIS_ENABLED and MCP_SERVER_ENABLED were read in the same pass, confirmed true, and deliberately left on — so image-analysis suggestions keep being written with no surface, and external MCP read access is unaffected. Verification: independent appsettings readback both before and after; app state Running; App Insights over the restart showed 329 requests / 0 failed / 0 exceptions, confirmed by a second pass at 283 / 0 / 0, with the config write pinned by the activity log to 11:32:54.519Z-11:32:55.441Z. Rollback is one command, no deploy.

retroReconstruction.evidence: az appsettings list both apps (02:20Z) + post-deploy live probes of the code-only d6ee70de deploy per the deployment runbook (2026-07-17: data-api + orchestration from packaged artifacts, parser remote build, SPA via swa): force re-drive of a prior linked instance refused 200 {deduped, outcome: linked}, force re-drive of a prior trigger_not_found instance restarted 202; Triage Inbox chips honest in Chrome

forceReDrive.note: Since the d6ee70de deploy, force=true on a Completed instance restarts only failure-family outcomes (trigger_not_found / no_source / not_eligible / ambiguous / skipped / bad_input); a prior created / linked / already_exists_linked outcome is refused and returned to the caller instead of a re-drive. Proven live both ways 2026-07-17. Live/Pending instances are never restarted.

triageInboxAnchors.behavior: hidden from the Triage Inbox, kept on the case
triageInboxAnchors.note: Since the d6ee70de deploy (2026-07-17) the inbox list slice excludes retro reconstruction anchor rows server-side (all three anchor variants, NULL-safe predicates); the case-scoped GET /api/inbound?caseId= slice keeps them, so the case Emails tab retains reconstruction provenance. Verified in Chrome post-deploy: the 'Other source' chip dissolved and mailbox chip counts dropped to real mail only (~149 anchor rows hidden).

RETRO_BOX_ARCHIVE_ROOT_IDS.note: Repointed 2026-07-16 evening to the Workflow/Reports/Reports archive root (operator decision). Matched pair with the Box facade's BOX_READONLY_ROOT_IDS — all three settings must stay aligned. Service-account Viewer grant on 4077648161 created 2026-07-16 (collab 74177634786, accepted); rung proven live (WF69NDX located its case folder).

RETRO_ADOPT_ARCHIVE_PO_ENABLED.note: TKT-219 dev/test posture: retro creates mint via the normal allocator (since d6ee70de the create seam acknowledges the discovered archive identity, so the unverified-archive-folder hold no longer blocks dev minting); the discovered archive PO is noted on the case and recorded queryably in the retro_case_created audit's after.discoveredArchivePo — case_ref keeps its normal externalRef precedence. Flip at production cutover after TKT-004 floor seeding (TKT-178 runbook).

RETRO_RELATED_INGEST_ENABLED.note: TKT-225 related-correspondence ingest lit after the dark deploy. Rung-1 re-drives of already-linked cases stop before the ingest seam by design — and since the d6ee70de deploy a force re-drive of a prior created/linked outcome is refused at the trigger route — so live chain proof comes from fresh reconstructions (sweep of 2026-07-17). Related-mail linking caps at 25 NEW links per run route-side (alreadyLinked rows never consume cap; overflow reported as skippedByCap).

boxWrites.note: Confirmed 2026-07-20 via `npx box folders:get 0`: 392761581105 is genuinely named "test folder"; the real archive root is a separate folder (4077648161, "Collision Engineers") not currently written to.

MILEAGE_ESTIMATE_AUTOFILL_ENABLED.note: Flipped true on cespkenrich-fn-gi62sd 2026-07-20 by explicit operator direction during the TKT-159 gate audit (settings backed up first, health confirmed after — the dvsa_mot_enrich route was already called twice post-change, both 200). Operator was shown the unresolved gaps before approving: no production chronological holdout (>=1,000 rows, only a 24-row synthetic fixture with MAE 379mi exists), the source-precedence safeguard (real mileage must always outrank an MOT estimate) is unproven live, and provider-side prior credential rotation is unproved. This is only the gate flip, not resolution of those gaps. TKT-152 verdict stays PENDING; ticket moved verify->blocked->now to reflect the gaps are now live-risk items.

safetyGates.liveCutoverNote: Deliberately UNCHANGED by the 2026-07-21 PLAN-015 'alpha cutover' — that operation re-scoped intake to the alpha mailbox and reset the data stores for the trial; it is NOT the ADR-0022 production cutover. The production cutover remains its own gated event: Box writes leave the test folder (BOX_FOLDER_ROOT_ID repoint), RETRO_ADOPT_ARCHIVE_PO_ENABLED flips after the TKT-004 authoritative floor seeding (TKT-178 runbook), and EVA production submission is separately gated. Everything in the alpha runs against the test Box folder (392761581105) and, once Phase 6 lands, the vendor TEST EVA environment.
